feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to test a service SEGW
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I created a service in the segw following this blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/building-a-custom-sap-gateway-service-with-segw/ba-p/13616605

at point 6 of the blog, it does a test of the service by inserting request uri + /$format=XML

but how can I do a test of the service and to send the fields in input?

 

Thank you

entry.title: rename Odata Classes
entry.content:
Hello great people ,

we have Odata project that already has existing implementation .

for naming convention purposes we have to rename the classes DPC/MPC etc .

is this possible or we have to copy the whole SEGW project and give new name at first runtime artifact creation ?

entry.title: Object dependency syntax in superbom
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a problem with dependency syntax in superbom, when creating configurable material.

I have one class (variant-300) with 8 characteristics and very big superbom.

When I want to order KMAT, I want to select in characteristic #2 option "B" and in characteristic #8 option "D".

But in superbom I want to have dependency for material (p.0150): 

-select this meterial when I choose characteristic #2 and option "B" 

and

-do NOT select when I choose characteristic #8 and option "D".

 

Example:

CHAR_2 = 'B' AND

NOT(CHAR_8 = 'D')

But this kind of syntax does not work. Would appreciate some help.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: cl_gui_docking_container Webgui No Data visible
entry.content:
Hi,

we created on SAP Gui a Docking Container for the MD04 which is working realy fine.

Inside the Docking Container there is an Property Box with some Values.

Now we need to start MD04 as an Webgui, through a Fiori Application.

The start is ok, we are in the MD04 the Docking Container is created with Header Text,....

But: No Property Box Values

We just get a Property Box, with Descriptions, we get the right amount of Row's but we do not have any Values in.

 

 

Any Ideas?

entry.title: Tables and Function modules to build a report using SRT_MONI interface data for sending mail alert
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My requirement is to send an alert (send an email notification) to business users if the interface ended with error status (including all type of errors) available in SRT_MONI. 

The PI (CPI) response back to SAP system was successful and the webservice data has ended into an error due to incorrect data or the data doesn't exist in the SAP system (DB). For example: Company code or Sales organization doesn't exist.

Therefore, business needs notification for these error result interface data along with the Payload data /the original XML file.

To achieve this, we planned to build a report program to list out all the error resulted interface data as an output which are sent as an email notification to the business users (along with the XML file/payload data) information. 

To build the report program, we have the data stored in the table SRT_MMASTER. Using this data we need to fetch or get the Payload information and the XML file details so we can convert into xstring and send it as an attachment file. 

Please share the associated tables and the Function modules to fetch the above required data. 

If you have any other possible solution to send an alert for the above requirement, please let me know and that would be highly appreciated. 

Note:

SXMB_GET_MESSAGE_PAYLOAD  (No result when provided Message ID from the table SRT_MMASTER)

SXMB_GET_MESSAGE_LIST (No result when provided Message ID from the table SRT_MMASTER)

SRT_MONI_GET_CALL_DETAIL (codes are commented and of no use)

Thank you.

entry.title: Runtime Information System user, wait inline for HTTP input
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Currently we have setup to send data from ECC to IBP cloud using HTTP.

Currently we are facing an issue with ABAP background job running too long to send the data. This is only happening in our Quality system but is working fine in the production environment. In production the background job takes 2000 seconds but in qulaity its taking more than 20,000 seconds.

When checking SM50 at application information section we get the following message: "Runtime Information: System user, wait inline for HTTP input". 

Please let me know how to resolve the issue.

Thanks

entry.title: SAP WebDynpro ABAP Splitter and Tree is not visible properly.
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

    I am trying to create a tree and table inside splitter ui element in SAP #WebDynpro #ABAP view.  my problem is when I execute the application i can see only 1st line of splitter element and tree and table are not fully visible. I have attached image for your reference. I am requesting you to kindly help me in this issue, I will greatly appreciate your kind gesture in this matte

Thank you

Best Regards

Naim

entry.title: Press Enter Before saving anything in ALV Output Editable Fields
entry.content:
Hello Everyone ,

I have created an ALV output and there are some editable fields , after users provide all the values in those fields and press save ( another button which I have added ) they need to click once their mouse or press enter else the last value provided in the screen is not captured while saving .

Is there any fm or any key word which I can use to capture the last value entered in the field without pressing the Enter key or click the mouse.
Thanking everyone in Advance !

entry.title: Unable to create ABAP project in ECLIPSE IDE
entry.content:
Hi all,

I installed the eclipse IDE and added the ABAP perspective to it.

But when i am going to create the project , i am getting like this.

when i click OK.

i am getting this. can you please help me in this.

I installed and followed the process as suggested by some You Tube video.

If i missed to install any other files or if i installed wrong version of the IDE or any other step need to follow, Please guide me in this, If possible provide the link for the files need to download. thank you for your time and support.

Thanks and Regards,

Praveen Sankaraddi

entry.title: Generate data auto for iDOC testing
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

 

Any tools that I can auto build data into iDOC structure like WP_PLU automatic. Since all data is in SAP table already.

 

Pls advice.

Thanks in advance

ABAP Development ABAP Extensibility SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit

entry.title: Production Order / BAPI
entry.content:
Hi,

There are an integration between MII and SAP.

Production order is created in SAP and then being sent to MII. MII can be change the item in the production order; but these changes are not reflected in SAP. For this reason we want to use BAPI. As a result if the one of the item delete in MII, changes reflect in SAP. 

There are BAPIs that we use below in a row.

CO_XT_COMPONENTS_DELETE
BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT
CO_XT_ORDER_PREPARE_COMMIT
BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT
CO_XT_ORDER_INITIALIZE
BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT

After we used BAPI, on the CO02 screen items colours changed but there aren't any deleted (silindi) sign on the screen.

Also there aren't any deleted (silindi) signs about related items on the resb table.

How can I figure it out? Thank you

entry.title: Activate Generic Object Services for PR
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

I have a case where for PR in ME52N and ME53N, the Generic Objects Services are disabled. The 'Relationships' button is greyed out. 

 

Could anyone please let me know how to activate this ? Can this be achieved by using the class 'CL_GOS_MANAGER'. If Yes, any suggestions on how to do it ?

 

Help Greatly appreciated. Best Regards.

entry.title: how to implement to method IF_EX_FAGL_COND_ACC_ASSIGNMENT - CONDENSE for transaction fagl_it_02
entry.content:
Hi all,

how can I edit this method IF_EX_FAGL_COND_ACC_ASSIGNMENT - CONDENSE ? It is called by transaction fagl_it_02

I need to add a piece of code here:

 

I implemented this enhancement, but it is not called by the transaction fagl_it_02

entry.title: Fetch data in ABAP, using SDA connection
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have data in table created on SDA connection, and want to fetch in ABAP.

Do we have any direct way to read data from SDA in ABAP?

One possible option for us is to, create virtual table in a database schema and fetch data in AMDP, and CDS table functions.

Thanks.

entry.title: QM Audit Management Automatic control in procurement.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can we control procurement using QM's audit management? Specifically, how can we automatically block procurement for a vendor or material if an audit fails without accessing any other quality transaction code?

entry.title: Goods Movement at ABAON
entry.content:
Hi,

In ABAON, after entering the details of the asset to be retired. I want to goods movement with " BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE " . any body suggest User exit with same code.

I tried with AINT0002 system not able to perform bapi successfully.

Pradip Patel.

entry.title: Dump CONVT_NO_NUMBER during edition smartform
entry.content:
Good morning,

Since couple of days, I have difficulties to modify specific smartforms trough transaction code SMARTFORMS.

Indeed, when I go in change mode on a specific smartform, then I select a node type "TEXT" and text type is "Text Element", then I add a variable like &GV_MASK&, I click on the check button and then I got a dump ( see attachment ) with the the following details :

Category               ABAP Programming Error
Runtime Errors         CONVT_NO_NUMBER
Except.                CX_SY_CONVERSION_NO_NUMBER
ABAP Program           SAPLSTXK
Application Component  BC-SRV-SCR
Date and Time          28.11.2024 10:23:15

 Short Text
     "15&GV_MASK&" cannot be interpreted as a number

 What happened?
     Error in the ABAP Application Program

     The current ABAP program "SAPLSTXK" had to be terminated because it has
     come across a statement that unfortunately cannot be executed.

 What can you do?
     Note down which actions and inputs caused the error.

     To process the problem further, contact you SAP system
     administrator.

     Using Transaction ST22 for ABAP Dump Analysis, you can look
     at and manage termination messages, and you can also
     keep them for a long time.

 Error analysis
     An exception has occurred which is explained in more detail below. The
     exception is assigned to class 'CX_SY_CONVERSION_NO_NUMBER' and was not caught
      in procedure
     "RTF_SET_PATTERN" "(FORM)", nor was it propagated by a RAISING clause.
     Since the caller of the procedure could not have anticipated this
     exception, the current program was terminated.
     The reason for the exception is:
     An attempt was made to interpret value "15&GV_MASK&" as a number.
     As this value contravenes the rules for displaying numbers correctly,
     this was not possible.

I do not know why I have this dump.

Can you please support quite urgently as I am unable to modify /correct smartforms which contains TEXT nodes.

Thank you for your support

Best regards,

Christophe

entry.title: SM13 update failed while creating a PO in ECC 6
entry.content:
Hi,

I am creating a PO in ME21N after save I got message that PO number successful created with some document number.

But then SM13 update get failed with error message DBSQL_DUPLICATE _KEY_ERROR.

I am not able to debug it and unable to find     the cause 

If anyone can help on this than please...it's urgent.

entry.title: Why isn't the "enhancement" I added working?
entry.content:
Hi Master,

 I want to add a warning behind the FB08 screen. As you can see in the images below, I wrote the ENHANCEMENT code under the END-ENHANCEMENT-POINT, but I can't see it in debug mode. What could be the reason for this?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Clear some fields when copying a PR to Create a new PR
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

I have a requirement where when creating a PR by copying another PR values, all the fields would normally be copied into the new PR. But, I have a requirement to clear two field values, 1. EBAN-BEDNR 2. Custom Field. 

So, when copying a PR, these two values should not be copied. Is there any way that I can clear these values before copying ?

 

Thanks and Regards.
